sections.heading: Common everyday Hindi words
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: yah, hai, main, tum, hum, kya, achha, theek, haan, nahi, karo, jao, aao, lo, de

main accha hoon
tum kaise ho
yah bahut achha hai
hum sab saath mein hain
kya tum chalte ho
haan main samajhta hoon
nahi mujhe nahi chahiye
aao baithte hain
yahan aao
dekho yeh dekho

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Common everyday Hindi words skills.
